name: Sample Recipe Recommendation Benchmark
description: Thesis-grade benchmark for the taxonomy-aware recipe recommendation and alternative-decision engine. 20 cases across 4 difficulty levels. Uses seeded recipe names as identifiers (resolved by BenchmarkRunner). Seeded recipes: recipe-full-match (Tomato+Onion+Garlic), recipe-missing-one (same), recipe-alternative-1 (Tomato+Onion), recipe-alternative-2 (Tomato+Onion), recipe-no-alternative (Garlic).

cases.description: All mandatory ingredients present — original recipe is cookable
cases.notes: Client has all 3 mandatory ingredients. Engine should return CanCook ~100%.

cases.description: Full match with extra pantry items
cases.notes: Extra Yoğurt in pantry doesn't break full-match logic.

cases.description: Two-ingredient recipe — both present
cases.notes: recipe-alternative-1 requires Tomato + Onion only.

cases.description: One-ingredient recipe — ingredient present
cases.notes: recipe-no-alternative requires only Garlic.

cases.description: Full match — ingredient name case insensitive lookup
cases.notes: BenchmarkRunner resolves ingredient names case-insensitively. Lowercase input must resolve to Tomato/Onion/Garlic.

cases.description: Missing one mandatory ingredient — alternative should be found
cases.notes: Client missing Garlic. recipe-missing-one needs Tomato+Onion+Garlic. Best alternative is recipe-alternative-1/2 (Tomato+Onion).

cases.description: Missing two mandatory ingredients — lowest-friction alternative
cases.notes: Missing Onion and Garlic. Alternative engine picks highest-scoring available recipe.

cases.description: Empty pantry — no ingredients at all
cases.notes: Client has nothing. All recipes fail. NeedsAlternative with no recommendation.

cases.description: Single ingredient pantry — only unrelated ingredient
cases.notes: Yoğurt is not used in any seeded recipe. No alternative possible.

cases.description: Available ingredients only match a two-ingredient subset recipe
cases.notes: Missing Tomato. Has Onion+Garlic. Alternative: recipe-no-alternative (Garlic, 1 match).

cases.description: No alternative available — single-ingredient recipe, no matching alternative
cases.notes: recipe-no-alternative needs Garlic. Client has Tomato. Alternative engine should rank recipe-alternative-1/-2 (Tomato+Onion needed but Onion missing).

cases.description: Pantry has exactly the ingredients for a two-ingredient alternative
cases.notes: Missing Garlic for full recipe. Client has Tomato+Onion → perfect match for recipe-alternative-1/-2.

cases.description: Single ingredient matches single ingredient planned recipe
cases.notes: recipe-no-alternative needs only Garlic. Garlic present. Yoğurt is extra.

cases.description: Full match for recipe-alternative-2
cases.notes: recipe-alternative-2 requires Tomato + Onion. Both present.

cases.description: Missing ingredient from two-ingredient recipe — single-ingredient alternative
cases.notes: Missing Onion for recipe-alternative-1. No recipe uses only Tomato. Score-ranked fallback.

cases.description: All ingredients available for alternative — planned needs one more
cases.notes: Missing Onion. Has Tomato+Garlic. Best scored alternative: recipe-no-alternative (Garlic=1.0).

cases.description: Larger pantry — all alternatives fully cookable, best score wins
cases.notes: Missing Garlic from planned recipe. Has Tomato+Onion → recipe-alternative-1/-2 both fully cookable. Engine picks top-ranked.

cases.description: Duplicate ingredient names in pantry list
cases.notes: Duplicate Tomato entries — deduplication by BenchmarkRunner should not affect matching.

cases.description: Unknown ingredient in pantry — does not resolve, but other ingredients do
cases.notes: BenchmarkRunner skips unresolved ingredient names. Known Tomato+Onion+Garlic still satisfy the recipe.

cases.description: Regression: no alternative scenario returns stable NeedsAlternative with null recommendation
cases.notes: Garlic not in pantry for recipe-no-alternative. Yoğurt not used by any seeded recipe. Verifies graceful NeedsAlternative null recommendation path.
